title: Phoning the health centre
tagline: No faces, no pointing - book an appointment with only your voice on the line.

lines.fi: Hei, mä haluaisin varata ajan lääkärille.
lines.en: Hi, I'd like to book an appointment with a doctor.

lines.fi: Selvä. Mikä on nimi ja henkilötunnus?
lines.en: Alright. What's your name and personal ID code?

lines.fi: Jani Virtanen. Sanonks mä sen tunnuksen?
lines.en: Jani Virtanen. Shall I say the ID code?
Go ahead. And what's the trouble?

lines.fi: Selkä on ollu kipee jo pari viikkoo.
lines.en: My back's been sore for a couple of weeks now.
Good, I've booked the appointment. Welcome on Thursday!
